title: Inline-action gap canonical(sibling gap = gap-2 / 8px)
mechanism: DS-wide:grep ItemInlineAction|ItemInlineActionButton 全 26 消費檔(production tsx 18 + stories 8),逐檔開 multi-action sibling wrapper 驗 gap:ItemSuffix primitive(item-anatomy.tsx:740 gap-2 SSOT)/ fieldWrapperStyles(field-wrapper.tsx:67-69 gap-2)/ Sidebar menu-inline-actions span(sidebar.tsx:1127 gap-2)/ sort-manager row(gap-2)/ item-anatomy stories 並排組(gap-2)。單 action 消費(Breadcrumb/Tag/Tabs/FileViewer/Input/NumberInput/data-table header)N/A
verdict: 0 after 全掃 26 files:所有多 inline-action 並排皆經 gap-2 canonical(ItemSuffix SSOT 或 fieldWrapper gap-2 透出),與 inline-action.spec.md「多個 Inline Action 並排」canonical 一致;本輪 InlineEdit/cell 重構未引入自訂 gap
